mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BT_LIKE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE BT_BOARD SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT + 1 WHERE IDX = #{idx}
UPDATE BT_LIKE SET LIKE_AVAILABLE = 1 WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT LIKE_AVAILABLE FROM BT_LIKE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.delete: UPDATE BT_BOARD SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT -1 WHERE IDX = #{idx}
DELETE FROM BT_LIKE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE BT_LIKE SET LIKE_AVAILABLE = 0 WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
